## What & why

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this change, and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm test` passes and `pnpm -r typecheck` is clean
- [ ] New behavior has a test / bug fixes have a regression test
- [ ] No hardcoded design values in templates (tokens only)
- [ ] Determinism preserved (same spec + copy → identical output), if rendering changed
- [ ] Docs / README updated if the surface changed

<!-- Anything worth flagging — a template that touches the art-director gate,
